summary: Frontend-only comprehensive smoke test of Aura Hotels across all 10 routes. Verified data-testids, open-state popovers, modals, live countdown, filter behavior, menu tabs, treatment selection, FAQ, and global nav/footer. All 17 scripted checks passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx experiences strip reuses experiences[0]/[1] with hardcoded titles; harmless for showcase but the data-testid uses index only (experience-tile-0..3), consider naming by slug.
BookingWidget always shows open popovers when showOpenStates=true — toggle button UX slightly odd (state controls only that popover; fine for showcase).
Design system fonts/colors and 20px radius verified visually consistent across pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only showcase, mock data. All pages/routes render correctly. Key testids present: hero-book-cta, hero-explore-cta, booking-widget, calendar-popover, guest-popover, promo-popover, room-card-*, room-details-*, room-detail-modal, testimonial-dot-*, input-last-name-error, book-now-btn (correctly disabled when last name empty), pay-method-{card,upi,netbanking,gpay,apple}, pay-securely-btn, payment-success-modal (contains AH-9F27C1), exp-details-heritage-walk, experience-modal, menu-tab-{breakfast,lunch,dinner,desserts,wine}, treatment-{abhyanga,shirodhara,hammam,couples}, tab-{gallery,video,tour,contact}, faq-0, site-navbar, site-footer. Dashboard live countdown ticks each second. Rooms 'Signature' filter reduces 4->1 as expected.
